data.body: Done (commit pending). validate_node_config → {ok,errors:[{path,message}],unavailable}; empty=valid, malformed=ok:false(not unavailable), violation=ok:false, validator-failure=unavailable:true (distinct, never false-valid). Bundle rebuilt. 289 unit + 4 browser e2e (Chromium ran) green; decision table + unavailable path verified directly. editor.py 776 LOC.
